verses.text: Jordan galkhata om mualtung gam leh lei niamna gam Lebanon lam Tuipi Lian dung khempeuhah a om kumpite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite leh Jebus mite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin
Joshua leh Israel mite a do dingin lungsim kikhatin kikhawm uh hi
Ahih hangin Gibeon khua-a teng mite in Jerikho leh Ai tungah Joshua' hihnasa thu a zak uh ciangin
amaute in khembawl ding vaihawm uh a, lam-an bawlin, a late uh tungah a paatsa ip leh a paatsa leenggahzu um, a kikeek leh a kiphopte suanin
a khe uhah a paatsa, a kiphop khedapte bulhin, a paatsa puante tawh a pai uh hi. A ante khempeuh uh zong keu-in ap hi
Amaute Gilgal-a giahphuala Joshua kiangah hong pai-in amah leh Israel mite tungah, “A gamlapi panin kong pai uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin kote tawh thuciamna khat hong bawl un,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Israel mite in tua Hiv mite kiangah, “Kote' mai-ah a teng mite na hi khathei ding uh hi. Tua hi leh note tawh thuciamna hong bangci bawltheih ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi
Amaute in Joshua kiangah, “Kote, nangma nasem ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Joshua in amaute kiangah, “Kuate na hi uh hiam? Koi lai panin hong pai na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Amaute in, “ Topa na Pasian uh min hangin a gamla mahmah gam panin na nasemte kong pai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama thu, leh Egypt gam sungah a hihte khempeuh
leh Jordan galkhatah a om Amor kumpi nihte ahi, Ashtaroth-ah a teng Heshbon kumpi Sihon leh Bashan kumpi Og tungah a hihte khempeuh a kigenna ka za khin uh hi

Ka upate uh leh ka gamsung uha a teng mite khempeuh in kote kiangah, ‘Na khualzinna ding uh lam-an bawl un la, amaute a dawntuah dingin pai-in amaute kiangah, “Kote, na nasem ka hi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin kote tawh thuciamna hong bawl un,” va ci un,’ hong ci uh hi
Hih lai-ah ka anlum uh om hi. No kiangah a hong pai dingin kong din'khiat ni uh, khualzin lam-an dingin ka inn panun ka guan' laitakun lum lai hi. Ahih hangin tu-in en un, keu-in ap hi
Hih leenggahzu umte ka thun laitakun a thak ahi hi. Tu-in en un, puakgawp ta hi. Hih ka puante uh leh ka khedapte uh khual gamlapi zinna-in paatgawpta hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite in amau' an puakte sangkha uh a, Topa' tung panin lamlahna donglo uh hi
Tua ciangin Joshua in amaute tawh kilemna bawlin, amaute a hin'sakna ding thuciamna a bawl uh hi. Tua ciangin mihonte' makaite amau' tungah a kiciam uh hi
Amaute tawh thuciamna a bawl khit uh ni thum a cin' ciangin, amaute pen a vengte ahihna leh amaute' nai-ah a tengte ahihna thu a za uh hi
Israel mite dingkhia uh a, a ni thum ni-in amaute' khuapite a ban uh hi. Amau' khuapite pen Gibeon, Khefirah, Beeroth, leh Kiriathjearim na hi hi
Ahih hangin, Topa, Israel Pasian min tawh mihonte' makaite kiciamzo uh ahih manin Israel mite in amaute thatlo uh hi. Tua ciangin makaite tungah mihon khempeuh phun uh hi
Ahih hangin makaite khempeuh in mihon khempeuh tungah, “ Topa, Israel Pasian min tawh amaute tungah i kiciamzo a, tu-in amaute i su thei kei ding hi
Amaute tungah i kiciam thuciamna hangin eite tungah hehna hong tung khading ahih manin hih bangin gamta-in amaute i hingsak ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin makaite in mihonte kiangah, “Amaute hingsak un,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin makaite' gen mah bangin mihon khempeuh-a' dingin amaute pen sing suite leh tui tawite a suak uh hi
Joshua in amaute samin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin kote' nai hih lai-ah a teng hinapi-in, ‘Note' kiang panin gamla mahmah ung,’ cihna tawh kote hong khem na hi uh hiam
Tu-in note hong kisamsia a, note pawlkhat a tawntungin sila, ka Pasian uh inn-a dingin sing suite leh tui tawite na hi ding uh hi,” a ci hi

Amaute in Joshua dawngin, “Gam khempeuh nang tungah a hong piakna ding Topa na Pasian in a nasempa Moses a thupiakna leh na mai panin gamsunga a teng mi khempeuh suksiat taktakna ding thu na nasemte kiangah hong kigen hi. Tua ahih ciangin note' hangin nakpi takin ka lunghimawh uh a, hih bangin ka gamtakha uh hi
Tu-in, en in, nangma khutsungah kote ka om uh hi. Hoih na sak bang leh kote tungah bawl dingin nangma muhna-ah man na sak bangin hong bawl in,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in amaute tungah tua bangin bawl a, Israel mite' khutsung panin amaute honkhia a, amaute thatsaklo hi
Ahih hangin Joshua in mihonte leh Topa' biakna tau-a dingin singtomte leh tuitawite a suaksak hi. Topa in amah biakna dingin a teelna munah tuni dongin tua nasepte mah amaute in sem uh hi.
